CopyCodeAI

Site: https://copycodeai.online/

What this site is:
- Launch engineering and implementation support for startups and digital businesses.
- Focused on practical work around websites, forms, booking/contact flows, ecommerce journeys, accessibility-sensitive paths, GDPR-aware data flow, and AI features where relevant.
- Technical guidance only. Not legal advice.

Public sections:
- Homepage: https://copycodeai.online/
- Services: https://copycodeai.online/services
- Contact: https://copycodeai.online/contact
- Guides index: https://copycodeai.online/guides/
- Work: https://copycodeai.online/work/

Key services:
- https://copycodeai.online/compliance-ready-landing/
- https://copycodeai.online/ai-feature-integration/
- https://copycodeai.online/eaa-structural-hardening/

Guides:
- https://copycodeai.online/guides/gdpr-ai-startup/
- https://copycodeai.online/guides/eaa-startup-websites/
- https://copycodeai.online/guides/data-flow-ai-feature/
- https://copycodeai.online/guides/launch-risk-review-checklist/

Notes:
- The site uses a structured consultation form and a separate direct booking path on the contact page.
- The Blueprint section on the homepage is a short planning/review entry point, not a mandatory prerequisite.
